title: Link to Roadmap
excerpt:
Hey @monday-team , 
I couldn’t find a link to the features roadmap. 
Can you please direct me to the place, and maybe add this to the announcement (or other topic) section 
Tnx in advance

posts.author: adibar (adi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @monday-team ,

I couldn’t find a link to the features roadmap.
Can you please direct me to the place, and maybe add this to the announcement (or other topic) section

Tnx in advance

posts.author: darrylclark (Darryl)
posts.cookedHtml: Yep, I’m looking for this. Have got one for subitems (Subitems Product Plan) but can’t find anything else

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @adibar!

We would love to share with you what we’re currently working on and what you can expect in the coming months.

In order to share the features roadmap with you, we do require a signed NDA. Could you please reach out to our team at support@monday.com, and we can pop this over to you!

Best,
Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
